name: Black Ox Beetle

attacks.name: Rock Throw
attacks.tell: It drives its head into the ground and tears up a rock to hurl at the player.
attacks.howToAvoid: Move diagonally or sideways as soon as you see the rock leave the ground.
attacks.notes: Stray hits from this attack can also enrage nearby creatures.

attacks.name: Horn Stab
attacks.tell: It lowers its head and stabs forward with the horn at close range.
attacks.howToAvoid: Block it from the front or slip toward one of its flanks.
attacks.notes: This is its standard stab and it heavily punishes staying in front of the horn.

attacks.name: Charged Stab
attacks.tell: It scrapes the ground before surging forward in a long charge.
attacks.howToAvoid: Dodge to the side at the last instant; a miss leaves a strong punish window.
attacks.notes: This is one of its most lethal options and the move that defines the fight.

attacks.name: Head Shake
attacks.tell: It chains a forward shove into one or two violent head shakes.
attacks.howToAvoid: Do not punish too early; wait until the whole sequence ends.
attacks.notes: It deals busting-style damage and can completely wreck your rhythm if you stay in front of it.

attacks.name: Spin Headbutt
attacks.tell: It hops, turns itself around, and sweeps the area with its body.
attacks.howToAvoid: Create distance when you see it hop or circle toward the opposite side of the spin.
attacks.notes: This is its most awkward space-control tool in tight terrain.

description: A heavily armored beetle that roams the high-end areas around the shed. Fighting it feels like dealing with a horned tank.
behavior: It has no special goal beyond roaming its territory, but reacts immediately once it spots a threat. Its attacks cover a lot of ground and can drag other creatures into the fight.
interactionWithPlayer: It is aggressive toward the player on sight. It alternates between close-range punishment, long charges, and rock throws so that mid-range never feels truly safe.
interactionWithCreatures: It is normally neutral toward other creatures, but often ends up fighting them when a stray rock or sweep clips them by accident.
strategy: Always respect its long-range threat. The key is to evade the charged stab and the rock throw, punish only after a full sequence ends, and never overextend in front of the horn.
respawnInfo: 3 days by default. In the shed surroundings it takes 1 day and in the Undershed 2 days.

combatStats.attackDamageSummary:
Rock Throw: 120
Horn Stab: 90
Charged Stab: 150
Head Shake: 80
Spin Headbutt: 100

specialTraits: Its weak point is the gut. It can also trigger chain fights by clipping other creatures with stray rocks.
